titleFr: Apprécier les capacités ou les compétences de quelqu’un
titleEn: To assess the abilities or competencies of someone

conceptExplanation.en: OF29 — To assess the abilities or competencies of someone. Source document SC102-2/29-2005F. Grammar taught: negation, comparatives.
